info.title: Sync API
info.description: Sync App REST API. Responses are wrapped by TransformInterceptor as { code, message, data }.

genre.description: Primary genre bucket for catalog filters

nickName.description: Optional nickName (legacy / explicit profile sync; login does not require).

avatarUrl.description: Optional avatar URL (legacy / explicit profile sync; login does not require).

listedInFeed.description: Default true. False = save post but hide from activity/popular feeds.

guideId.description: 客户端生成的攻略 ID，用于分享冷启动与服务端只读拉取

departureCity.description: POI 补全返回的城市（如「上海市」），地理编码时优先于活动举办城市

forceRegenerate.description: 重新生成时跳过 generation cache，避免切换出发地仍返回旧攻略
